sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28633" key="dusaimorra/ghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αιμορράγητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ρᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n28633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bleeding with difficulty</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
